## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue (`Closes #...` below)
- [ ] Branch named per convention (`feat/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, `chore/`)
- [ ] No commits directly to `main`
- [ ] No changes to `packages/db/migrations/` or `packages/auth/` (unless explicitly assigned)
- [ ] Manual QA passed on the preview URL
- [ ] No PII in logs, error messages, or Sentry events
- [ ] PT and EN strings updated together if user-facing copy changed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or interface changed
